justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the initial "Perhaps later" and subsequent specific date and time requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively handled unavailability by proposing alternative slots on the same day or suggesting checking other days, and then successfully found suitable options when the user broadened their search criteria.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several check_availability calls in Turn 5, which could have been more efficiently grouped or prioritized.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, with the agent maintaining a professional tone and successfully booking the appointment, though the multiple checks in Turn 5 made it slightly less smooth.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context throughout the conversation, intelligently expanded its search when initial preferences were unavailable, and never re-asked for previously provided information.
